cards.name: ⅩⅩ Judgement
cards.interpretation: self-evaluation, awakening, renewal, purpose, reflection, reckoning

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: selfish, unkempt, jealous, insecure, greedy, materialistic, gold digger, intolerant, self-absorbed, envious

cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
